summary: Converted `ftdrawcommon` from a pure assembly object into an in-progress C translation, matching at least `func_8008051C` and preserving the larger unfinished `func_800805C8` behind inline assembly with a `NON_MATCHING` C draft. The PR also added required fighter struct discoveries, moved `HSD_CObjGetCurrent` to the proper cobj header with a typed return, introduced `ftdata.h` for the per-fighter callback table, and split remaining small data constants into `ftdrawcommon_data.s`. The author noted that more progress on `jobj` was required to continue.
what_changed: Renamed `asm/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.s` to `src/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c` and began replacing assembly with C.
Implemented `func_8008051C` in C using `func_80087074`, `HSD_CObjGetCurrent()->view_mtx`, `PSMTXIdentity`, a local inline matrix translation helper, and `PSMTXConcat`.
Kept `func_800805C8` as inline assembly in the matching build while adding a large `#ifdef NON_MATCHING` C draft with a decomp.me scratch link and explicit note that it was only 82.39% matched.
Added `asm/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon_data.s` for small-data constants `lbl_804D8368`, `lbl_804D836C`, and `lbl_804D8370`, including `-2`, `-1`, and `0` data used by the retained assembly/C draft.
Updated `obj_files.mk` to build `src/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c.o` instead of the old assembly text object and to add `asm/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon_data.s.o`.
Changed `UnkFlagStruct` from a struct to a union with a raw `u8` member plus bitfield access, allowing both whole-byte copies and named bit access.
Changed `Fighter::x21FC` from raw `u8` to `UnkFlagStruct x21FC_flag`, with call sites updated to use `.u8` for whole-byte assignment/copy and `.bits` for individual flags.
Added an `itPickup` struct at fighter offset `0x294` with named Vec2 offsets for ground-light, ground-heavy, and air-light item pickup data.
Refined several `Fighter` layout regions by replacing filler with discovered fields at offsets `0x2F0`, `0x2F4`, `0x3E0`, `0x1614`, `0x166C`, and `0x1670`.
Added `src/melee/ft/ftdata.h` declaring `extern void (*lbl_803C20CC[66])(HSD_GObj*, s32, void*)`, used by `ftdrawcommon` for fighter-kind-specific draw callbacks.
Moved/remodeled `HSD_CObjGetCurrent` declaration from generic `include/functions.h` to `include/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.h` with typed return `HSD_CObj*`.
smart_moves: Separated data constants into a dedicated assembly data file so the text object could move to C while preserving exact small-data layout and references.
Used a union for `UnkFlagStruct` so decompiled code can express both byte-level operations (`x21FC_flag.u8`) and bitfield checks (`x21FC_flag.bits.bN`) without losing layout accuracy.
Kept the nonmatching `func_800805C8` C translation behind `#ifdef NON_MATCHING` and retained matching inline assembly for production, allowing documentation of progress without regressing matching.
Typed `HSD_CObjGetCurrent` in the baselib cobj header, enabling direct field access such as `HSD_CObjGetCurrent()->view_mtx` instead of untyped pointer arithmetic.
Extracted a small inline helper for repeated matrix translation writes, making the matched `func_8008051C` and the draft `func_800805C8` share the same structure.
Replaced anonymous fighter filler with offset-annotated fields only where the new draw/common code had evidence for specific accesses.
decomp_lessons: When converting an assembly object to C incrementally, keep unmatched functions as inline assembly and gate draft C under `NON_MATCHING`; this preserves build correctness while capturing reverse-engineering progress.
Small-data symbols referenced from both C and retained assembly may need a separate `.sdata2` assembly file to avoid disrupting addresses or relocation style.
For flag bytes in large structs, a union of raw `u8` plus bitfields is useful when existing code performs both whole-byte copies and individual bit tests.
Moving prototypes out of catch-all `functions.h` into subsystem headers improves type information and can make decompiled code cleaner, especially for struct field access.

Struct layout progress in one system can unlock matching elsewhere; here `ftdrawcommon` required naming fighter fields for item pickup, hurtbox/draw regions, accessory display, and flag-controlled rendering paths.
Progress on dependent libraries can block full matching; the author specifically stated that more `jobj` progress was required to continue.
naming_conventions: Preserved unknown function names in address form such as `func_8008051C`, `func_800805C8`, `func_80087074`, and `func_80390EB8` where semantic names were not established.
Used offset-prefixed fighter field names such as `x21FC_flag`, `x294_itPickup`, `x2F4`, `x3E0`, `x1614`, and `x166C` to keep layout evidence explicit.
Named the new item pickup substructure `itPickup` and its known Vec2 members by use/context: `x0_ground_light_offset`, `x10_ground_heavy_offset`, and `x20_air_light_offset`.
Kept raw data labels such as `lbl_804D8368`, `lbl_804D836C`, `lbl_804D8370`, and `lbl_803C20CC` where no semantic name was available.
Used subsystem header naming consistent with existing tree layout: `src/melee/ft/ftdata.h`, `src/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.h`, and `include/sysdolphin/baselib/cobj.h`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Converted the object entry in `obj_files.mk` from `asm/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.s.o` to `src/melee/ft/ftdrawcommon.c.o` while adding `ftdrawcommon_data.s.o` for remaining data.
Used inline assembly fallback with `#pragma push` and `asm unk_t func_800805C8()` for a still-unmatched function.
Documented the nonmatching attempt with a decomp.me scratch URL and match percentage comment: `7183 (82.39%)`.
Adjusted retained assembly symbol references from forms like `lbl_804D836C@sda21(r2)` to `lbl_804D836C(r2)` in the inline assembly context shown in the diff.
Introduced extern declarations for unresolved functions and data used by the in-progress C file rather than over-naming unsupported semantics.
Used explicit stack padding arrays and local variable ordering in the C translation, a common tactic for matching stack layout in MWCC decompilation.
Represented current camera access as `HSD_CObjGetCurrent()->view_mtx`, matching prior assembly that added `0x54` to the current CObj pointer.

review_feedback.text: More progress on `jobj` is required to continue with this.
review_feedback.interpretation: Further matching of `ftdrawcommon`, especially display paths using `HSD_JObjDispAll` and jobj-related debug/assert strings, was blocked by incomplete `jobj` decompilation.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that continue or fully match `func_800805C8` in `ftdrawcommon.c`.
Find PRs that decompile or type `jobj` enough to unblock `ftdrawcommon`.
Search for later renames of `x21FC_flag` or individual `x21FC_flag.bits` meanings.
Search for later semantic names for `itPickup` and the offsets at `Fighter` `0x294`, `0x2F4`, `0x3E0`, `0x1614`, `0x166C`, and `0x1670`.
Find later replacements for `lbl_803C20CC` with a named fighter draw callback table.
